error_body: An error has occurred. If you don't know what happened, please report this on our Discord and include the following error message:
remove_mod_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{modName}}?
remove_mod_hint: This will unregister the mod from the launcher.
delete_files_checkbox: Also delete {{fileCount}} mod file(s) from disk
delete_files_checkbox_one: Also delete {{fileCount}} mod file from disk
cannot_close_body: You cannot close the launcher while something is downloading.
cannot_close_warning: Force closing may corrupt your install!
confirm_uninstall_body: Are you sure you want to uninstall {{appName}}? This will remove all game files. Your mods and user configuration settings will be preserved.
file_conflict_files_plural: The following files were overwritten in the game folder:
file_conflict_files_singular: The following file was overwritten in the game folder:
file_conflict_hint_plural: Another mod may have been using these files. If you experience issues, try disabling conflicting mods.
file_conflict_hint_singular: Another mod may have been using this file. If you experience issues, try disabling conflicting mods.
already_installed_body: {{modName}} was not installed because identical files are already present in the local mod {{existingModName}}.
already_installed_hint: If you still want to install this mod, remove the local mod first.
unknown_mods_body: The following mod files were found in your game folder but aren't tracked by the launcher. Would you like to register them as custom mods?
install_folder_body: Please choose an installation folder. This folder should not be a folder that is synced with the cloud. If you do not know what folder to choose, just click "Okay".
folder_not_empty: The folder selected is not empty! Make sure it doesn't have any files in it.
modified_files_body: You have modified XML settings in {{modName}}. Removing this mod will lose your custom settings for the following file(s):
modified_files_body_one: You have modified XML settings in {{modName}}. Removing this mod will lose your custom settings for the following file:
modified_files_confirm: Are you sure you want to continue?
enter_email_password: Please enter your email and password.
something_wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
email_not_verified: Your email address has not been verified. Please check your inbox for a verification email.
username_chars_error: Username can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
username_hint: 1-25 characters. Letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores only.
password_requirements_error: Password does not meet the requirements.
username_email_taken: Username or email is already taken.
account_created: Account created! We've sent a verification email to {{email}}.
account_created_hint: Please check your inbox and click the verification link to activate your account, then sign in.
